name: Ginger Creams (Ginger Bread Boys)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together until smooth.
2. Gradually add the molasses, hot coffee, baking soda, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, ground cloves, salt, and flour to the mixture in order.
3. Chill thoroughly before rolling out.
4. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters (gingerbread men preferred).
5. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
